nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs at 08:00 daily. Change expression to suit.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT count(*) FROM raw_events WHERE ingested_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS raw_ingested,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM parsed_transactions WHERE parsed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND ebk_status = 'written') AS written_to_ebk,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM parsed_transactions WHERE parsed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND parse_method = 'groq') AS groq_calls,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM failed_events WHERE failed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND resolved = FALSE) AS open_failures,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM dedup_log WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') AS deduplicated,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM parsed_transactions WHERE direction = 'debit' AND transaction_time >= date_trunc('month', NOW())) AS month_spend

SELECT fe.id, fe.stage, fe.error_message, re.subject, re.sender, fe.failed_at FROM failed_events fe LEFT JOIN raw_events re ON fe.raw_event_id = re.id WHERE fe.resolved = FALSE ORDER BY fe.failed_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, input_fragment, parsed_fields, called_at FROM groq_parse_log WHERE promoted = FALSE ORDER BY called_at DESC LIMIT 5

parameters.jsCode:
const stats = $('Query yesterday stats').first().json; const failures = $('Query open failures').all().map(i => i.json); const groqItems = $('Query unreviewed GroqCloud').all().map(i => i.json); const date = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN', { dateStyle: 'full' }); let failureRows = failures.length === 0 ? 'None — all clear' : failures.map(f => ` ${f.id} ${f.stage} ${f.subject || '—'} ${f.error_message?.substring(0, 80) || '—'} ` ).join(''); let groqRows = groqItems.length === 0 ? 'None pending' : groqItems.map(g => ` ${g.id} ${g.input_fragment?.substring(0, 80) || '—'} ${JSON.stringify(g.parsed_fields)?.substring(0, 100) || '—'} ` ).join(''); const html = `

Finance pipeline — daily digest

${date}

Last 24 hours

MetricValue
Emails ingested${stats.raw_ingested}
Transactions written to ezbookkeeping${stats.written_to_ebk}
Deduplicated (dropped)${stats.deduplicated}
GroqCloud fallback calls${stats.groq_calls}
Open failures${stats.open_failures}
Month-to-date spend (₹)₹${Number(stats.month_spend).toLocaleString('en-IN')}

Open failures (manual review needed)

${failureRows}
IDStageEmail subjectError

GroqCloud parses not yet promoted to regex

${groqRows}
IDInput fragmentParsed fields

To mark a failure resolved: UPDATE failed_events SET resolved=TRUE WHERE id=<id>;
To promote a Groq pattern to regex: see RUNBOOK.md

`; return [{ json: { subject: `Finance digest — ${date}`, html } }];
